description: You are a warehouse supervisor at a safety equipment distributor. A customer, 'Northwind Safety Distributors', has ordered 50 units of 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E'. Since you currently only have 30 units in stock, process the immediate delivery of the 30 available units and create a backorder for the remaining 20 units so they ship when replenished. Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo) to complete this task. Ensure the original delivery is marked as 'Done' and a new delivery order (Backorder) is created for the remaining quantity.
